ASPECT KEYWORD EXPANSION REVIEW
============================================================

INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Review 'Newly Added Keywords' for each aspect
2. Remove any irrelevant keywords
3. Add valid new aspects from 'Candidate New Aspects'
4. Save final dictionary as 'final_aspects.json'

============================================================

EXPANDED KEYWORDS BY ASPECT:
--------------------------------------------------

Battery:
  Original (7): awet, baterai, batre, boros, charging, daya, ngecas
  Expanded (17): awet, baterai, baterainya, batrai, batrainya, batre, batrei, batreinya, batreny, batrenya, boros, cas, charging, daya, dicas, ngcas, ngecas
  Newly Added (10): baterainya, batrai, batrainya, batrei, batreinya, batreny, batrenya, cas, dicas, ngcas
